feed.title: Mahmod Mahajna (4sploit)

entry.title: SecTalks Brisbane CTF Cracknet Challenge
entry.summary: In this tutorial, i am going to solve “cracknet” challenge from SecTalks Brisbane CTF 2017. Click Here to download cracknet.exe. As we can see, the application prompts us to input a password, i...

entry.title: RPISEC Crackme Challenges
entry.summary: In this tutorial, i am going to solve crackme challenges from RPISEC. crackme0x00a As you can see, we’re required to enter a correct password for the success message to be displayed. We launch...

entry.title: PicoCTF Best Shell Challenge
entry.summary: In this tutorial, i am going to solve “best shell” challenge from PicoCTF 2014. We first download best_shell.c file using the following command: 1 $ curl https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ctfs/wri...
